message:
chore(snapshots): regenerate golden checksums and test snapshots after widget rendering changes

Update 70 snapshot files and 3 golden checksum files to reflect the
current rendering output after recent widget changes:

- Golden VFX checksums (mandelbrot, metaballs, plasma) updated for
  120x40 at 16ms with seed42
- Demo showcase snapshots updated across all accessibility modes
  (high contrast, large text, reduced motion, combined) for dashboard,
  widget gallery, layout lab, visual effects, mermaid showcase, guided
  tour, palette, and debug overlay screens at 80x24, 120x40, and
  200x50 viewports
- Harness modal backdrop opacity snapshot updated
- Dashboard hover dataviz ANSI snap updated with adjusted color values

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
